penalties.description: Cannot determine task completion status due to excessive motion blur and lack of visible final state with secured loop and cut tail.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement on video quality and task completion. Claude reported excessive motion blur preventing assessment, while GPT-4o claimed to observe completion. Given that incomplete_task is an automatic zero condition in the rubric, and Claude's detailed description of visual quality issues provides specific grounds for inability to assess completion, the conservative approach is to apply the incomplete_task penalty.
